text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……My body, it's as if there is a 
fever welling up inside of me……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
………This heat, is from a bygone memory 
that I can't even remember.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahah, since we're here, I'll be taking this power to move forward, so that my journey will be different to "them".
